full_text:
Sun Yan (Shuran) 孫炎 (叔然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Yan (孫炎), styledShuran (叔然), was born in Le'an commandery. Adhered to Zheng Xuan’s sect. Sun Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
